---
title: "Understanding things I don't know makes me happy. Fortunately, I don't know many things."
# description: ""
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: "148px"
  image-align: right
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
